headline: Is ServiceNow (NOW) Now Attractive After A 42.5% Year To Date Share Price Fall?
summary: Wondering if ServiceNow is attractively priced or still carrying a premium? This article walks through the key signals that can help you judge whether the current share price lines up with its fundamentals. After closing at US$84.78, the stock has seen sharp moves recently, with a 12.1% decline over 7 days, 19.0% over 30 days and a 42.5% fall year to date. This adds fresh questions about both risk and potential upside. Over the past year, ServiceNow has also logged a 54.8% negative return,...

headline: Markets Recover With Focus on Big Tech Earnings Over Iran. Stock Futures Rise.
summary: Stocks looked set to rise on Friday as solid tech earnings helped reassure investors who were questioning whether the market could keep its recent rally going.  The three major indexes all fell on Thursday as tensions flared up in the Strait of Hormuz and International Business Machines and ServiceNow both reported unspectacular earnings, sparking another selloff in software stocks.  Oil prices were barely moving on Friday as President Donald Trump said the cease-fire between Israel and Lebanon would extend another three weeks.

Oil prices were barely moving on Friday as President Donald Trump said the cease-fire between Israel and Lebanon would extend another three weeks.

headline: LSI Industries And 2 Other Stocks That May Be Priced Below Estimated Value
summary: The United States market has remained flat over the past week but has seen a significant increase of 30% over the past year, with earnings projected to grow by 16% annually in the coming years. In this context, identifying stocks that may be undervalued can provide opportunities for investors seeking to capitalize on potential growth at a reasonable price.
